justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's temporal preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent proposed reasonable alternatives by checking subsequent days when the initial requests were unavailable.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent was efficient, only asking for necessary information and not making redundant API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was mostly smooth and professional, with the agent effectively guiding the user to a successful booking.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered well by checking subsequent days when appointments were unavailable, maintaining context throughout the process.
